title: Prehistoric Liliths Apearance
wikitext:
[]: Prehistoric Lilith's Apearance             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Tue Aug 19, 2008 2:59 pm It was brought to my attention that no one really knows what Lilith looked like when she first came to Earth. So I ask this: What did Lilith look like when she came to Earth? We know Adam looks like this: And had wings like this: But what would Lilith have looked like prior to here being held at Nerv and before her merger with Rei? If anyone can provide substantial evidence, insightful descriptions, and maybe some artwork to boot, this mystery can be solved, at least for the fans. P.S.: For the artwork, please try to make it new and creative, no kindergarten doodling please. I (and probably most of us)would like something either realistic to the show or realistic in general.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Aug 19, 2008 3:24 pm Probably just like Adam a giant white humanoid.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Tue Aug 19, 2008 3:41 pm Adam and Lilith look well Human They don't have the side weapon holders on them. I'm sure NERV put those on Adam to try to restrain him better...That worked well.

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Tue Aug 19, 2008 6:33 pm Otakon 08 Ikari wrote: They don't have the side weapon holders on them. I'm sure NERV put those on Adam to try to restrain him better...That worked well.

[]:             Quote Post by Caiden » Tue Aug 19, 2008 6:48 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Probably just like Adam a giant white humanoid.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Aug 19, 2008 6:50 pm Like how Ritsuko says that the shoulder pylons are artificial and used to "restrain", it comes to reason that it applies to Adam as well, since the excavation image has none, and at the point of the end of the Katsuragi Expedition, they are there. Also in the same episode, Eva-01 breaks out of the pylons. Caiden wrote: Is that Adam or Lilith? Because, That looks nothing like the adam, and if its lilth, it seems should would of been found in Antarctica too, by the winter coats and blowing wind.

[]:             Quote Post by Caiden » Tue Aug 19, 2008 7:05 pm I unno, somthing about that pic bothers me.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Tue Aug 19, 2008 8:10 pm Hmm... is the lance sticking through the back from above or did Adam fall on it and that's just the pointy end sticking out the other side of the wound?

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Tue Aug 19, 2008 8:15 pm Spear. The CI says it nailed Adam.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Tue Aug 19, 2008 8:40 pm Anonymous_Evafan wrote: Spear.

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Tue Aug 19, 2008 9:01 pm Um, so about what Lilith used to look like.....

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Tue Aug 19, 2008 9:50 pm NemZ wrote: and where, pray tell, is this specifically spelled out in the CI?

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Tue Aug 19, 2008 9:57 pm That pic just disturbs the hell out of me.

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Tue Aug 19, 2008 10:01 pm I never understood why Lilith is missing an arm. I read Reichu's long-winded theory on it, but... a simple and elegant possibility seems impossible

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Tue Aug 19, 2008 10:02 pm I always thought it was an action shot, with Lilith moving her arm in pain.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Tue Aug 19, 2008 10:03 pm Action_Bastard wrote: Um, so about what Lilith used to look like.....

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Tue Aug 19, 2008 10:05 pm Action_Bastard wrote: I always thought it was an action shot, with Lilith moving her arm in pain.

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Tue Aug 19, 2008 10:14 pm NAveryW wrote: Like Lilith on the cross, but with more regular legs and such. We don't know what her face looked like, but it's probably the usual Angel face.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Tue Aug 19, 2008 10:27 pm [quote="Anonymous_Evafan"]Well found with Adam at the very least. Add pic and do the math. Also the Adam section says reseal . sure... but did the spear seal adam on it's own volition, because she took an intentional dive to sort out the problem, or because that sneaky Lilith bitch got her from behind? The world may never know. I already posted it once in the other thread. Less pregnant version of Lilith on the cross.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Aug 20, 2008 3:19 pm Monk Ed wrote: I never understood why Lilith is missing an arm. I read Reichu's long-winded theory on it, but... a simple and elegant possibility seems impossible
